feature.label: GAMA Developer Tools
feature.description: Installs the GAMA Developer Tools plugin, which provides wizards for creating new GAMA plugins, skills, operators, and actions, as well as a Really Refresh utility for cleaning and rebuilding the GAMA development workspace.
feature.copyright: (c) 2007-2026 UMI 209 UMMISCO IRD/SU & Partners (IRIT, MIAT, ESPACE-DEV, CTU)
